transcript:
Agent: Thank you for calling Pain Management and Neurology Clinic. This is Maria, how can I help you today?
Caller: Hi Maria, I'd like to schedule a follow-up appointment with Dr. Patterson.
Agent: Of course! I'd be happy to help you with that. Can I please have your full name and date of birth for verification?
Caller: Sure, it's Jennifer Walsh, date of birth March 12, 1985.
Agent: Thank you, Jennifer. I have your file pulled up. I can see you were last seen by Dr. Patterson on October 3rd. Let me check his availability for you. Would you prefer a morning or afternoon appointment?
Caller: Afternoon would work best for me, if possible.
Agent: Let me look at what we have. I have an opening on Tuesday, November 26th at 2:30 PM at our Riverside location. Would that work for you?
Caller: That sounds perfect.
Agent: Wonderful! I've got you scheduled for Tuesday, November 26th at 2:30 PM with Dr. Patterson at our Riverside clinic. You'll receive a confirmation text and email shortly. Is there anything else I can help you with?
Caller: No, that's everything. Thank you so much, Maria!
Agent: You're welcome, Jennifer! We'll see you on the 26th. Have a great day!
Caller: You too, bye!
Agent: Goodbye!
